3.sql: SELECT bygningid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, representasjonspunkt AS geom FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality boundary by kommunenummer to avoid name ambiguity

2.description: get 200-year storm-surge areas filtered by intersection with Kristiansand municipality boundary

3.description: get buildings in Kristiansand municipality by kommunenummer

4.description: find buildings within 50 metres of storm-surge areas using dwithin

5.description: calculate distance from each building to the nearest storm-surge area

6.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance

7.description: sort buildings by distance ascending, then by building ID ascending for deterministic order

9.description: add municipality and county names from step 1 to the final result
